definition: The project name; metaphor for the underground network connecting trees in a forest (Wood Wide Web)
The query language; a single thread of fungal mycelium. Pronounced /ˈhaɪfiː/
The containment-tree storage layer: a materialized-path radix trie
The cross-cutting-edge storage layer: CSR-encoded adjacency lists per edge kind
The reactive query layer: Salsa-style dependency tracking with subscription-based invalidation
The team of AI agents developing Mycelium; defined under .hive/
A directory under packs/<lang>/ containing pack.toml, queries.scm, and optionally hooks.wasm. Adds support for one programming language.
The mandatory startup ritual for every agent invocation: read charter, role, memory, anti-patterns
The mandatory shutdown ritual: append decisions/lessons/anti-patterns/audit entries
The human with final authority over the project. Currently @aimasteracc.
The certification model used instead of a CLA. Signed-off-by: trailer on every commit.
The single required CI status check on PRs; aggregates lint, test, coverage, security results.
GitHub issue #1; closing it halts all autonomous Hive activity within 60 seconds.

canonical-ja: レジストリファーストリリース
definition: Release process pattern (adopted from tree-sitter-analyzer): publish to crates.io/npm/PyPI BEFORE merging the release branch to main, ensuring tags always have published artifacts.
